3009750.name: Dimensional Phobos Threat
3009750.description:
Dimensional Phobos Threat is a horror investigation game for 1 to 4 players, where you become an employee of an agency that deals with paranormal issues. Your mission will be to lift the curse with the help of your team.



To lift a curse, first explore the Place and find the clues left behind. When you're ready, all you need to do is find the right items, use them and lift the curse.
Players will search the paranormal environment for the items needed to lift the curse.
The paranormal realm is full of terrifying creatures and dangerous places to explore. These creatures are always after the players. Players must help each other or survive on their own in this spooky environment.

Following the clues of the cursed places, you must find cursed items and use them. But this task will not be easy. At every step you will be chased and ambushed by AI enemies.

Strategic thinking and cooperation are key to survival. Players must support each other by sharing tasks between players and avoiding enemies. Finding the right item to use is also important; one wrong move and you can attract the attention of enemies and face a tough escape.

Once you destroy all the items to lift the curse, your quest will be complete and lead you to freedom.

Dimensional Phobos Threat is not only a horror game, but also a challenging experience that requires strategy and cooperation. Gather your courage and join this unforgettable adventure to lift the curse and escape the dark place!
3009750.supported_languages: 英语, 土耳其语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 简体中文, 保加利亚语, 日语, 韩语
